summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of CakeShop application (pure HTML/CSS/JS frontend with FastAPI backend). All major features tested and working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend API testing (26/26 endpoints passed - 100% success rate)
Home page loads with hero section, search bar, category filters, and 8 cake cards
Login page loads properly with email/password form
Admin login (admin@cakeshop.com / Admin@123) works and redirects to admin dashboard
Signup page loads with name/email/password form and user registration works
Forgot Password page loads, submits email, and shows success state with reset link
Admin Dashboard loads with correct stats (Total Users: 1, Total Orders: 0, Total Cakes: 8, Total Revenue: ₹0)
Admin Cakes page loads with cake table showing all cakes
Admin can add new cake via modal form (successfully added 'Test Automation Cake')
Admin can edit existing cake (price modification tested)
Admin can toggle stock status of cakes
Category filter on home page works (chocolate filter shows 2 cakes)
Search on home page works (chocolate search shows 2 results)
Product detail page loads when clicking cake cards
Admin cake management CRUD operations functional
Error handling works (invalid login, invalid forgot password email)
